title: Wittmackia linharesiorum
taxonomy: Wittmackia linharesiorum is classified in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family. This family comprises tropical plants with a high diversity of species. Wittmackia linharesiorum belongs to the genus Wittmackia, which is a group of epiphytic plants native to South America. The genus Wittmackia is a relatively small group within the family Bromeliaceae. Wittmackia linharesiorum is further classified into a specific species within the genus.
uses: Wittmackia linharesiorum is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal uses.
